---
name: Skill Submission
about: Submit a new skill for the Squire skills library
title: "[Skill] "
labels: skill-submission
assignees: ''
---

## Skill name

What is the skill called?

## Domain

Which domain does this skill belong to? (e.g., frontend, backend, marketing, finance, DevOps)

## What it does

One paragraph describing the skill's purpose and when an agent should use it.

## How you tested it

Describe how you verified the skill works. Which AI agent did you test with? What task did you give it? What was the output quality?

## Skill content

Paste the full skill markdown below, or link to a file in your fork.

```markdown
<!-- Paste skill content here -->
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill follows the format of existing skills in `skills/`
- [ ] Skill solves a real problem I have encountered
- [ ] Skill does not require runtime dependencies
- [ ] Skill works independently (no required dependencies on other skills)
